title: elaeocarpus rumphii subsp. rumphii
intro: Elaeocarpus rumphii subsp. rumphii, also known as the Rumph's blue marble tree or blue marble tree, is a species of flowering plant in the Elaeocarpaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health issues due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus rumphii subsp. rumphii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially preventing certain types of cancer. Elaeocarpus rumphii subsp. rumphii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal dosages.
